flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Howard University rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.9k → $35.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Howard University rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.9k → $35.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Howard University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Howard University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (8.9k → 10.1k).
